title: SODAX Partner with Spoon Finance to Power USDT Access on Kaia
message_html: SODAX Partner with Spoon Finance to Power USDT Access on Kaia ...
snippet: SODAX (@gosodax): SODAX Partner with Spoon Finance to Power USDT Access on Kaia @SpoonFinanceX integrates the SODAX SDK to bring cross-network USDT liquidity directly into its platform on @KaiaChain. Spoon users benefit from deeper effective liquidity as trades draw from USDT depth across the SODAX
